help.title: ヘルプとサポート
help.subtitle: ヘルプを入手し、ドキュメントを参照し、当社のチームにお問い合わせください。
help.documentationDescription: Browse guides, tutorials, and API references.
help.contactSupportDescription: Get help from our team. Usually responds within 24 hours.

faq0.question: How do I create an automation?
faq0.answer: Go to the Automations page and use the Natural Language Workflow Builder. Describe what you want to automate in plain English, and Pytomatiza+ will build the workflow for you.

faq1.question: How do I connect a new integration?
faq1.answer: Navigate to Settings → Integrations to connect third-party services like Google Workspace, Slack, or GitHub.

faq2.question: What happens if an agent fails?
faq2.answer: Failed agents are marked with an error status. You can view the error details in the agent card and retry the execution.

faq3.question: How do I change my language?
faq3.answer: Click the globe icon in the header to switch between 9 supported languages.

automations.title: 自動化
automations.subtitle: 自然言語自動化ワークフローを作成および管理する

nlpBuilder.title: 自然言語ワークフロービルダー
nlpBuilder.description: 自動化したい内容をわかりやすい英語で説明すると、Pytomatiza+ がワークフローを構築します。
nlpBuilder.instructionLabel: 何を自動化したいですか?
nlpBuilder.instructionPlaceholder: 例: クライアントから添付ファイル付きのメールを受信した場合、添付ファイルを Google ドライブに保存し、Slack で通知します。
nlpBuilder.instructionHelper: できるだけ具体的にしてください。 トリガー、条件、および必要なアクションを含めます。
nlpBuilder.agentTypeLabel: 推奨されるエージェントの種類
nlpBuilder.requireApprovalHelper: 有効にすると、ワークフローは実行前にレビューのために一時停止します。
nlpBuilder.building: ワークフローを構築中…
nlpBuilder.suggestions: 次の例を試してください。
nlpBuilder.example1: クローズされたすべてのチケットの週次レポートを毎週金曜日の午後 5 時にチームの Slack チャネルに送信します
nlpBuilder.example2: Twitter のメンションを監視し、ヘルプ センターへのリンクを使用してサポートの質問に自動的に返信します。
nlpBuilder.example3: 「見込み客」Google シートに新しい行が追加されると、Gmail 経由でパーソナライズされたウェルカム メールが送信されます

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Automate intelligent document processing with AI agents

upload.title: Attach document
upload.description: Drag and drop your file here or click to select
upload.supportedFormats: Supported formats: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, TXT, CSV, images

instruction.title: What should the AI agent do?
instruction.description: Describe in natural language what you want the agent to do with this document.
instruction.label: Agent instruction
instruction.placeholder: e.g., Extract all data from the table on page 3 and convert it to a CSV spreadsheet. Then email it to finance@company.com.
instruction.helper: Be specific: include which data to extract, output format, recipients, and post-processing actions.

presets.extract: Extract all structured data from this document and export as CSV.
presets.convert: Convert this document to PDF format while preserving the original layout.
presets.merge: Merge this document with other files in the folder and generate a single unified PDF.
presets.ocr: Scan this document using OCR and extract all text in editable format.
presets.summarize: Summarize the content of this document in one paragraph with key points.
presets.translate: Translate this document to English while preserving the original formatting.

recentDocuments.title: Recent documents
recentDocuments.empty: No documents processed yet. Upload your first document above.

processing.error: Failed to process document. Please try again.
processing.reprocessInstruction: Reprocess the document {name} applying the same previous transformations.

googleDrive.title: Google Drive
googleDrive.description: Access and select documents directly from your Google Drive.

dialogs.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone.

data.title: Data & Spreadsheets
data.subtitle: Connect data sources, transform spreadsheets, and automate analysis

source.title: Data source
source.description: Choose how to connect your data

instruction.title: What to do with the data?
instruction.description: Describe the desired transformation, analysis, or automation
instruction.label: Processing instruction
instruction.placeholder: e.g., Merge 'First Name' and 'Last Name' columns, filter records with sales over $10,000, group by region, and generate a bar chart.
instruction.helper: Include filters, aggregations, table joins, and the desired output format.

preview.title: Preview
preview.noData: Connect a data source to preview
preview.name: Name

googleDrive.title: Google Drive
googleDrive.description: Access spreadsheets and data files directly from your Google Drive.

errors.connectFailed: Failed to connect to data source.

results.connected: Connected successfully! Data source ready for processing.
results.transformComplete: Transformation complete! {count} records processed. The result is ready for download.
results.analyzeInstruction: Analyze the connected data and generate insights: trends, outliers, correlations, and recommendations.
results.scheduleAlert: Scheduling configured! Data will be processed automatically.

merge.label: Merge columns
merge.prompt: Merge 'Name' and 'Last Name' columns into a single 'Full Name' column.

filter.label: Filter records
filter.prompt: Filter records where 'Sales' column is greater than $10,000.

group.label: Group & summarize
group.prompt: Group data by 'Region' and calculate the sum and average of 'Sales'.

pivot.label: Pivot table
pivot.prompt: Create a pivot table with 'Category' as rows, 'Month' as columns, and sum of 'Revenue'.

chart.label: Generate chart
chart.prompt: Generate a bar chart comparing sales by region.

export.label: Export structured
export.prompt: Export the transformed data to a CSV file with UTF-8 encoding.

communication.title: Communication
communication.subtitle: Automate emails, messages, and multi-channel notifications

composer.title: Compose message
composer.description: Describe the content and the AI agent will draft the message
composer.instructionPlaceholder: e.g., Send a reminder email to all clients with invoices due in 3 days, using a professional yet friendly tone, and include the payment link.
composer.instructionHelper: Specify: message tone, information to include, personalizations, and call-to-action.

recipients.title: Recipients
recipients.description: Configure who will receive the message

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.dateTimePlaceholder: Date/time picker available in the full version.

actions.testSendDescription: Send a test to verify formatting

results.draftSaved: Draft saved successfully! You can access it in 'Messages > Drafts'.
results.testSent: Test sent to {email}! Check your inbox.

errors.testNoRecipient: Please enter a recipient for the test.

media.title: Media & Images
media.subtitle: Process, convert, and optimize images and media in batch

instruction.title: What should the AI agent do with the media?
instruction.description: Describe in natural language what you want the agent to do with your images or videos.
instruction.label: Agent instruction
instruction.placeholder: e.g., Remove the background from all images, resize to 1200x800 maintaining aspect ratio, convert to WebP at 85% quality, apply brightness +10 filter, and add '© My Company' watermark at the bottom right corner.
instruction.helper: Include: which transformations to apply, dimensions, output format, quality, filters, and watermark.

upload.title: Media upload
upload.description: Drag images or videos to get started
upload.supportedFormats: Formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, SVG, WebP, MP4, MOV, WebM

transformations.title: Transformations
transformations.description: Choose what to do with your media
transformations.watermarkDescription: Add text or logo overlay on the image

googleDrive.title: Google Drive
googleDrive.description: Access images and videos stored in your Google Drive.

googlePhotos.title: Google Photos
googlePhotos.description: Access your photos and albums directly from Google Photos.

results.aiInterpreted: Instruction interpreted successfully! Transformations have been pre-configured as described. Review the adjustments in the panel and click 'Process media' to apply.
results.downloadSimulation:
Simulating download of {count} processed file(s) as ZIP.

In the full version, all files would be compressed and downloaded.
results.downloadComplete: Download complete! Files removed from the list.

files.title: Files
files.subtitle: Manage, organize, and automate file operations

instruction.title: What should the AI agent do with your files?
instruction.description: Describe in natural language how you want to organize, process, or manage your files.
instruction.label: Agent instruction
instruction.placeholder: e.g., Organize all PDFs in the Downloads folder by creation date, rename them using the pattern 'YYYY-MM-DD - original name', move invoices to /Finance/Invoices/{year}/{month}, and compress files older than 6 months.
instruction.helper: Include: which files to affect, how to organize them, renaming pattern, destination folders, and additional actions.

upload.title: File upload
upload.description: Drag files or folders to upload

files.aiPlaceholder: Ex.: Organize todos os PDFs da pasta Downloads por data de criação, renomeie com o padrão 'YYYY-MM-DD - nome original', mova faturas para /Financeiro/Faturas/{ano}/{mês} e compacte arquivos com mais de 6 meses.

googleDrive.title: Google Drive

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.subtitle: Generate architecture diagrams and technical documentation with AI

diagramBuilder.title: Describe your architecture
diagramBuilder.description: Describe the system in natural language and the AI agent will generate the diagram
diagramBuilder.instructionPlaceholder: e.g., E-commerce system with: load balancer (Nginx), 3 API instances (Node.js on Kubernetes), primary PostgreSQL + read replica, Redis for caching, RabbitMQ queue for orders, Python workers, and S3 storage for product images.
diagramBuilder.instructionHelper: Include: components, connections, protocols, technologies, and data flow.
